title: KandyToys PROF Flexible Neck Refillable Safety Gas Clicker Lighter | Candle, Cooker, BBQ, Camping Lighter
features: Essential Needs - This Gas lighter has been built to create the best flame for the job
Multiple Uses - Easy to use for lighting your BBQ, oven stove, candles, fireworks and more!
Safe & Reliable - The long flexible neck protects your hand from the flame, plus you can position the which way the flame is directed due to the flexible neck
Different Colours - We have a range of assorted colours from blue and red to yellow and purple (colours will be sent at random)
Tested - This product meets all UK safety regulations
description: Introducing our Flexible Neck Refillable Safety Gas Clicker Lighter, the perfect companion for all your lighting needs. Designed for convenience, safety, and durability, this versatile lighter is a must-have tool for every household. Features: Flexible Neck: The flexible neck design allows you to effortlessly reach tricky angles and tight spaces, making it ideal for lighting candles, stoves, grills, and more with ease and precision. Refillable & Reusable: Replenish the gas supply whenever needed, reducing waste and saving you money in the long run. Safety First: Equipped with a child-resistant safety lock, our lighter provides peace of mind, ensuring it won't accidentally ignite in the hands of curious little ones. Easy Click Ignition: The simple click ignition mechanism offers hassle-free operation, eliminating the need for flints or matches. Just press the button, and you're ready to light up your world. Ergonomic Design: Designed for comfort and usability, our lighter features an ergonomic handle that fits comfortably in your hand, making it a pleasure to use for extended periods. Multipurpose Use: Whether you're lighting candles for a cozy night in, firing up the grill for a barbecue, or embarking on outdoor adventures, our flexible neck lighter is up to the task.
